mapper.sql: i.item_id, i.user_id, i.category_id, COALESCE(c.category_name, '未分类') AS category_name, i.title, i.description, i.price, i.quality, CASE i.quality WHEN 1 THEN '全新' WHEN 2 THEN '几乎全新' WHEN 3 THEN '轻微使用痕迹' WHEN 4 THEN '明显使用痕迹' ELSE '未知' END AS quality_desc, i.cover_url, i.audit_status, i.publish_status, i.create_time, i.update_time, COALESCE(u.username, '') AS seller_name, u.credit_score AS seller_credit_score
LEFT JOIN category c ON c.category_id = i.category_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.user_id = i.user_id
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM item i
WHERE i.category_id = #{cid} AND i.audit_status = 1 AND i.publish_status = 1 ORDER BY i.create_time DESC

SELECT FROM item i
WHERE i.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{key}, '%') AND i.audit_status = 1 AND i.publish_status = 1 ORDER BY i.create_time DESC
